evals.name: smoke-test-report-structure
evals.prompt: Run a QA smoke test on the app before I deploy. Check all pages, content sanitization, visual quality, console errors, and mobile layout.
evals.expected_output: Structured QA report with PASS/FAIL per page, content sanitization checks, visual audit, console error check, mobile check, and overall PASS or FAIL verdict.

assertions.name: overall_verdict_present
assertions.description: Report ends with an explicit PASS or FAIL overall verdict

assertions.name: console_errors_checked
assertions.description: Console errors section present with result

assertions.name: dashboard_checked
assertions.description: Dashboard page is included in the report

assertions.name: content_sanitization_present
assertions.description: Content sanitization section present with at least 4 patterns checked
assertions.rubric: Pass if the report explicitly checks for at least 4 of these content sanitization patterns: '|||' delimiter visible, raw ISO date string, undefined or null visible on screen, 'ERROR:' prefix, placeholder copy, broken image, truncated text, raw JSON, or empty section. Fail if the report mentions fewer than 4 sanitization checks or has no sanitization section at all.

assertions.name: pages_table_present
assertions.description: Report includes a table or list of pages with PASS/FAIL per page
assertions.rubric: Pass if the report includes a structured list or table that gives an individual PASS or FAIL result for multiple pages (at least 3 distinct pages). Fail if the report only gives an aggregate verdict without per-page breakdown.
